holdings.infoBox: WR is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 8.11%, Chevron at 5.94%, RTX Corporation at 5.26%, Palantir Technologies at 4.61%, and Lockheed Martin at 3.88%.

overview.description: The Corgi U.S. War Machine ETF (WR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in companies tied to defense, national security, and energy supply themes, including aerospace and weapons manufacturers, military technology providers, and oil and gas businesses. The fund aims for growth of capital. WR was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
